examples: Oh, Provolone, how I do ever love thee!
If you’re in the mood for cheese, don’t leave without sampling provoleta – a smoky provolone sprinkled with oregano.
Place in large bowl with provolone cheese, mozzarella cheese, Parmesan cheese, garlic, pepperoni, olive oil, salt, and ground black pepper.
"I caught one guy using Parmesan instead of provolone, and salami instead of pepperoni!"
This farce about a Prohibition racketeer named Snaps Provolone (Sylvester Stallone) is the kind of film in which an accountant named Little Anthony (Vincent Spano) is sure to drive an Imperial.
